Docs

Studio UI · Registry

Theme

The agent-native UI registry

A browser-renderable surface over the accepted Stream 5 seams — the generated Jami factory theme, the registry and workspace descriptors, the resident renderer, and the workbench presentation seam. Policy, tool execution, memory, and provenance stay owned by Jami Harness; this surface only displays and configures.

Addnpx @jami-studio/cli add solo-workspace --registry https://registry.jami.studio
20Workspaces
605Registry items
17Primitives
10Themes

Registry

Workspaces

Each workspace renders from generated workspace manifests, mounted React route artifacts, and primitive-factory state evidence: app-shell navigation, route maps, page/block/component parts, install graph metadata, and long-content/empty/error states. These are local server-rendered React implementations, not a claim of hosted runtime.

agent-native-studio agent-native-studio

installable generated shell route

One cohesive Studio workspace pack for the 13 public Agent-Native template apps: Dispatch mission control plus Clips, Plan, Design, Content, Slides, Analytics, Mail, Forms, Brain, Assets, Calendar, and Chat.

State coverage

long content
The Agent-Native Studio pack keeps every public template app installable as one graph while the actual React apps run through the Agent-Native gateway and Harness owns governance.
empty
No records are loaded in the local aggregate Studio pack; install the workspace graph or open the Agent-Native gateway to run the actual apps.
error
A template app reports display-only status here until its live Agent-Native route or Harness-governed action is opened.

Surface vocabulary (described in generated shell; mounted React route artifacts emitted locally)

clips plan design content slides analytics mail forms brain assets calendar dispatch chat

analytics analytics

installable generated shell route

Agent-Native Analytics Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

State coverage

long content
Agent-Native Analytics keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Agent-Native Analytics in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Agent-Native Analytics agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

State coverage

long content
Assets keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Assets in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Assets agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

State coverage

long content
A compliance exception with a long policy name wraps inside row cells and cards.
empty
No open schedule exceptions are announced as an empty operational state.
error
A review queue error is shown without retrying or executing harness actions.

State coverage

long content
Agent-Native Calendar keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Agent-Native Calendar in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Agent-Native Calendar agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

State coverage

long content
Clips keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Clips in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Clips agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

content content

installable generated shell route

Agent-Native Content Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

long content
Design keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Design in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Design agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

dispatch dispatch

installable generated shell route

Agent-Native Dispatch Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

State coverage

long content
Agent-Native Forms keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Agent-Native Forms in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Agent-Native Forms agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

State coverage

long content
Agent-Native Plan keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Agent-Native Plan in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Agent-Native Plan agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

State coverage

long content
Long source names, citation strings, and outline sections wrap inside the writing shell.
empty
No citations selected is displayed as an empty table/list state.
error
Review-agent errors are presented as inert status without executing actions.

State coverage

long content
A long source title, task description, or calendar note wraps inside the shell without horizontal overflow.
empty
No tasks are due; the data-list announces an empty status instead of hiding the section.
error
Agent status is displayed as an error panel with no executable action wiring.

State coverage

long content
Agent-Native Videos keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.
empty
No records are loaded for Agent-Native Videos in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.
error
Agent-Native Videos agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path.

Runtime preview

Mounted React workspace routes

Server-rendered React app/page/block routes from packages/ui/src/workspaces.mjs. These local preview artifacts use the resident wrappers and generated workspace manifests; hosted workspace routes, hosted runtime state, persistence, backend registration, and harness execution are not claimed.

Branding

Default kit options

Selectable brand/template descriptors generated through registry theme items. They express token deltas and workbench presentation choices against the accepted token model; none claims final brand canon or redistributes the exploratory logo source.

Command Grid

selectable

Sharper workspace-shell direction for mixed-media and business operations: blue command accents, tighter radius, and registry-first install cards.

light.accent
dark.accent
focusRing
registry item
command-grid-brand
default kit role
workspace shell stress-test candidate
brand canon
not final canon
seed use
Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor.
CLI inspectable
Token deltas
  • semantic.light.accent -> #315C8E
  • semantic.dark.accent -> #9BB7E3
  • componentState.focusRing -> #A64B72
  • radius.control -> 4px
  • spacing.control -> 7px
  • density.workspace -> 0.9
  • motion.fast -> 80ms
  • shell.dockWidth -> 280px
Best fit
mixed-media workspacebusiness operations workspaceregistry item choice and install inspection
Open risks
  • can feel too cold unless paired with the soft character cue
  • requires careful contrast checks for blue accent on dark surfaces

Editorial Studio

selectable

A restrained creator-workbench option with richer plum accent, quieter spacing, and wordmark-first presentation for docs and writing workspaces.

light.accent
dark.accent
focusRing
registry item
editorial-studio-brand
default kit role
editorial workspace candidate
brand canon
not final canon
seed use
Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor.
CLI inspectable
Token deltas
  • semantic.light.accent -> #6F3D5F
  • semantic.dark.accent -> #D8A5C8
  • componentState.focusRing -> #237C7A
  • radius.control -> 8px
  • spacing.control -> 10px
  • density.workspace -> 1.05
  • motion.fast -> 140ms
  • shell.dockWidth -> 340px
Best fit
research-writing workspacedocs and source panelsbrand book and documentation previews
Open risks
  • must avoid drifting into a cream-only editorial page
  • needs sharper app-chrome treatment for dense operations screens

Studio Console

selectable

Dense workbench shell with character cues reduced to compact chrome, teal command affordances, and controlled warm-magenta emphasis.

light.accent
dark.accent
focusRing
registry item
studio-console-brand
default kit role
operational default candidate
brand canon
not final canon
seed use
Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor.
CLI inspectable
Token deltas
  • semantic.light.accent -> #2F6F73
  • semantic.dark.accent -> #76C6BE
  • componentState.focusRing -> #C14D84
  • radius.control -> 6px
  • spacing.control -> 8px
  • density.workspace -> 0.95
  • motion.fast -> 100ms
  • shell.dockWidth -> 300px
Best fit
default kit install previewCLI and registry package cardsoperator-heavy workbench sessions
Open risks
  • can become too utilitarian if the character cue is removed entirely
  • needs a production small mark before package badges use it

Contracts

Vocabulary schema

Resident component prop schemas and React-style descriptors loaded from packages/ui. The renderer uses this handshake to reject stale vocabulary versions and unsupported props before it emits an inert render tree.

handshake
2026-06-09.vocabulary-handshake
payload schemas
2026-06-09
prop schema
2026-06-09.ui-props
factory source
packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs
invalid props
invalid
unsupported components
unsupported

button

primitive framework-neutral-component-factory
registry item
@jami-studio/button
prop schema
2026-06-09.ui-props
element
button
component source
packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs
a11y role

Components

Radix/React wrapper slice

Server-rendered React output from the resident wrapper slice. Button uses Radix Slot for asChild; text-field uses Radix Label; composed display components are React wrappers over source-owned tokenized markup. The data-only renderer still rejects package imports.

implemented
button panel date-control text-field calendar data-list chart agent-panel docs-source-panel media-grid tabs dialog popover dropdown-menu tooltip select accordion
source
packages/ui/src/radix-react-wrappers.mjs
resident vocabulary wrappers
complete-local-source
pending wrappers
none in resident vocabulary

Rendering

Resident renderer

Each card is a real renderer-produced render tree for a checked compatibility fixture. Valid payloads render resident components; action references render display-only (executable: false); unknown, unsafe, or malformed payloads fail closed to an inert fallback.

Denied by harness policy
uiPayload.unsupported.componentUnsupported
This component is not supported by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • component unknown-chart is not allowlisted
uiPayload.invalid.bad-prop-typeInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • prop invalid must be boolean
uiPayload.invalid.bad-propsInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsupported prop href for button
uiPayload.invalid.bad-refsInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (3)
  • payloadId must use uip_ prefix
  • actionRef action.save-theme must use act_ prefix
  • artifactViewRef artifact.theme-report must use artv_ prefix
uiPayload.invalid.dangerous-htmlInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (3)
  • unsafe prop dangerouslySetInnerHTML
  • unsafe prop __html
  • HTML-like string is not allowed
uiPayload.invalid.event-handlerInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsafe prop onClick
uiPayload.invalid.foreign-namespaceInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • componentRef namespace must be @jami-studio/ui
uiPayload.invalid.htmlInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • HTML-like string is not allowed
uiPayload.invalid.inline-secretInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • secret-bearing prop authorization must be a harness secret reference
uiPayload.invalid.invalid-enumInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • prop variant must be one of primary, secondary, ghost, danger
uiPayload.invalid.javascript-urlInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • javascript: URL is not allowed
uiPayload.invalid.lowercase-event-handlerInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsafe prop onclick
uiPayload.invalid.package-importInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsafe prop packageImport
uiPayload.invalid.radix-wrapper-importInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsafe prop packageImport
uiPayload.invalid.react-elementInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsafe prop $$typeof
uiPayload.invalid.stale-vocabulary-handshakeInvalid (failed closed)
This payload was rejected by the resident renderer.
Why (1)
  • unsupported vocabularyHandshakeVersion
renderer.error.invalid-propsError
The resident renderer reported an error.invalid_props

Presentation

Workbench presentation panels

Harness-originated refs (artifact views, evidence packets, run-event traces, memory records, context packs, action refs) presented through the workbench seam as inert operational descriptors. Redaction, freshness, and denial are displayed, never decided here.

Jami Studio
Docs GitHub npm

Generated by node apps/workbench/build.mjs from generated artifacts and the checked fixture corpus. No remote registry fetch, package-manager install, provider runtime, or harness execution is performed.

Sources: packages/tokens/generated/jami.css · packages/registry/generated/registry.json · packages/registry/generated/workspaces/*.workspace.json · packages/renderer/fixtures/compatibility/* · packages/renderer/fixtures/presentation/*.

Pending: external hosted runtime, hosted persistence, backend registration, and harness runtime — none are claimed here. Backend config evidence: config-missing / STUDIO_UI_WORKBENCH_BACKEND_URL is not set.
